query:
UPDATE places SET 
  description = CASE type
    WHEN 'island' THEN CONCAT('Discover the charm of ', name, ', a beautiful island in the Maldives offering pristine beaches, crystal-clear waters, and authentic local experiences. Perfect for travelers seeking genuine island life, water sports, and cultural immersion.')
    WHEN 'activity_spot' THEN CONCAT(name, ' is a premier diving and snorkeling destination offering excellent marine life viewing opportunities. Experience vibrant coral reefs, diverse fish species, and unforgettable underwater adventures in the Maldives.')
    WHEN 'resort' THEN CONCAT(name, ' is a luxury resort offering world-class amenities, pristine beaches, and exceptional service. Perfect for travelers seeking the ultimate island getaway with premium accommodations and activities.')
    WHEN 'airport' THEN CONCAT(name, ' Airport is a gateway to the Maldives, providing convenient access to island destinations. Modern facilities and efficient services ensure a smooth travel experience.')
    ELSE CONCAT(name, ' is a popular destination in the Maldives offering unique experiences and attractions. Explore local culture, natural beauty, and adventure opportunities.')
  END,
  icon = CASE type
    WHEN 'island' THEN '🏝️'
    WHEN 'activity_spot' THEN '🤿'
    WHEN 'resort' THEN '🏨'
    WHEN 'airport' THEN '✈️'
    ELSE '📍'
  END,
  color = CASE type
    WHEN 'island' THEN '#0891b2'
    WHEN 'activity_spot' THEN '#06b6d4'
    WHEN 'resort' THEN '#14b8a6'
    WHEN 'airport' THEN '#8b5cf6'
    ELSE '#6366f1'
  END,
  rating = CASE WHEN rating IS NULL OR rating = 0 THEN 4.5 ELSE rating END,
  difficulty = CASE WHEN type = 'activity_spot' AND (difficulty IS NULL OR difficulty = '') THEN 'intermediate' ELSE difficulty END,
  bestSeason = CASE WHEN bestSeason IS NULL OR bestSeason = '' THEN 'November to April' ELSE bestSeason END
WHERE description IS NULL OR description = ''
